description:
## 🤖 New release * `balls`: 0.3.1 -> 0.3.2
Changelog

## [0.3.2](https://github.com/mudbungie/balls/compare/v0.3.1...v0.3.2) - 2026-04-16 ### Changes - Record per-plugin synced_at on tasks [bl-5c42] - Add plugin diagnostics channel on FD 3 [bl-4758] - Pass --config to auth-check and auth-setup [bl-e5d1] - Pin uppercase-hex acceptance in validate_id [bl-9fd2] - Wire up Config.version as a schema-version gate [bl-2da0] - Consolidate priority validation into task::parse_priority [bl-8313] - Forward-compat passthrough on Task and Note structs [bl-f9db] - Lenient TaskType deserialization for forward compat [bl-fe19] - Lenient Status deserialization for forward compat [bl-23c8]

--- This PR was generated with [release-plz](https://github.com/release-plz/release-plz/).
title: chore: release v0.3.2
